executives.name: Javier Olivan
executives.background: Javier Olivan has served as our Chief Operating Officer since August 2022. He joined the company in 2007 and previously served as Chief Growth Officer.

executives.name: Katja Lake
executives.background: Katja Lake (formerly Katja Cipane) has served as a member of our board of directors since September 2016. Ms. Lake is a private investor and was previously a partner at Union Square Ventures.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer / Head of Investor Relations
